title: arctostaphylos crustacea subsp. tomentosiformis
intro: Arctostaphylos crustacea subsp. tomentosiformis, also known as Bigberry manzanita, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Bigberry manzanita include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
